indicators.name: brick wall
indicators.rationale: Brick walls can be cold and uncomfortable to touch, affecting sleep quality.

indicators.name: red pipes
indicators.rationale: Red pipes are visually distracting and may be perceived as a safety hazard.

indicators.name: ceiling beams
indicators.rationale: Ceiling beams can be visually distracting and may cause discomfort when lying down.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene has several negative indicators that contribute to a lower score for sleep (primary). The brick wall, red pipes, and ceiling beams are all potential sources of discomfort and distraction, making the space less suitable for sleep.
